# Issue 6 Todo: Floating Mini-Chat Widget

## Goal
Implement the floating mini-chat widget on the landing page, including responsive behavior, ChatShell wiring, file-upload disablement for mini-chat, and required verification checks.

## Scope Decisions Locked
- Technologies section removal is in-scope for issue 6.
- Close behaves like minimize for this slice (hide only, preserve conversation state).
- Proceed based on verified code evidence for dependency #5.

## Implementation Tasks

1. [x] Add ChatInput mini-chat toggle support (Priority 1)
- Repository/Project: src/InterviewCoach.WebUI
- File: src/InterviewCoach.WebUI/Components/Pages/Chat/ChatInput.razor
- Changes:
  - Add a new parameter: `IncludeFileUpload` (default `true`).
  - Render attachment button and hidden InputFile only when `IncludeFileUpload` is `true`.
  - Keep full-page chat behavior unchanged when parameter is omitted.
- Done when:
  - ChatInput compiles.
  - Existing Chat page still shows attachment UI by default.
- Dependency: none
- Parallel: no (foundation for widget behavior)

2. [x] Create FloatingChatWidget component markup and logic (Priority 2)
- Repository/Project: src/InterviewCoach.WebUI
- File: src/InterviewCoach.WebUI/Components/Pages/Chat/FloatingChatWidget.razor
- Changes:
  - Add open/closed UI states with launcher button and panel.
  - Add delayed auto-open on first render (500 ms).
  - Add header with title + minimize and close buttons.
  - Wire ChatShell + ChatMessageList + ChatInput.
  - Pass `IncludeFileUpload="false"` to ChatInput.
  - Implement close behavior as hide-only (same as minimize).
- Done when:
  - Widget opens/closes from user actions.
  - Chat messages flow through ChatShell in widget.
- Dependency: Task 1
- Parallel: no
